When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated and a row is added to this table.  The 
third column specifies which sections or sub-sections have been updated.  The fourth column should 
mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

I EXECUTIVE SUMMARY 
I.1 Products covered by this document 
This document covers the Copernicus Marine Environment Monitoring Service (CMEMS) product: 
ARCTIC_ANALYSIS_FORECAST_WA VE_002_014 which is the near -real time analysis and 
forecast of ocean wave parameters for the Arctic. 
 
The product is produced by the Arctic Monitoring and Forecasting Centre (Arctic MFC) using the 
WAM numerical prediction model, which consists of the following elements: 
• The WAM numerical wave model version at MET Norway. 
• Spatial resolution of 3x3 km on a polar stereographic grid. 
• Wave propagation under sea ice and wave -current int
